\DoxyCodeLine{00316\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}

\DoxyCodeLine{00323\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}

\DoxyCodeLine{14228\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ The\ Production\ of\ Points\ Uniformly\ Distributed\ in\ a\ Multidimensional}}

\DoxyCodeLine{14230\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ Preprint\ IPM\ Akad.\ Nauk\ SSSR,}}

\DoxyCodeLine{14232\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14233\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ Parameters:}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14234\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14235\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ Input,\ int\ DIM\_NUM,\ the\ number\ of\ spatial\ dimensions.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14236\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ DIM\_NUM\ must\ satisfy\ 1\ <=\ DIM\_NUM\ <=\ 1111.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14237\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14238\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ Input/output,\ long\ long\ int\ *SEED,\ the\ "{}seed"{}\ for\ the\ sequence.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14239\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ This\ is\ essentially\ the\ index\ in\ the\ sequence\ of\ the\ quasirandom}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14240\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ value\ to\ be\ generated.\ \ On\ output,\ SEED\ has\ been\ set\ to\ the}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14241\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ appropriate\ next\ value,\ usually\ simply\ SEED+1.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14242\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ If\ SEED\ is\ less\ than\ 0\ on\ input,\ it\ is\ treated\ as\ though\ it\ were\ 0.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14243\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ An\ input\ value\ of\ 0\ requests\ the\ first\ (0-\/th)\ element\ of\ the\ sequence.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14244\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14245\ \textcolor{comment}{//\ \ \ \ Output,\ double\ QUASI[DIM\_NUM],\ the\ next\ quasirandom\ vector.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{14246\ \textcolor{comment}{//}}
